Class ReservationController

java.lang.Object
logicControllers.ReservationController
public class ReservationController extends Object
Controller class responsible for handling the logic of restaurant reservations. This includes checking for availability, managing the seating process, calculating available time slots, and processing cancellations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final ReservationDAO
    resdb
    Data access object for reservation-related database operations.
    private final RestaurantSettings
    settings
    Singleton instance containing the current restaurant configuration.
    private final TableDAO
    tabledb
    Data access object for table-related database operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ReservationController()
    Initializes the ReservationController, instantiates the DAOs, and ensures that restaurant settings (opening hours and special dates) are loaded from the database into the singleton instance.

  • Field Details

    • resdb

      private final ReservationDAO resdb
      Data access object for reservation-related database operations.

      Data access object for table-related database operations.

      Singleton instance containing the current restaurant configuration.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservationController

      public ReservationController()
      Initializes the ReservationController, instantiates the DAOs, and ensures that restaurant settings (opening hours and special dates) are loaded from the database into the singleton instance.

  • Method Details

    • getAvailableTimes

      public List<LocalTime> getAvailableTimes(LocalDate date, int guests)
      Retrieves a list of available reservation times for a specific date and number of guests. Considers opening hours, current time (for same-day bookings), and table capacity. * @param date The date to check for availability.
      Parameters:
      guests - The number of guests for the reservation.
      Returns:
      A list of LocalTime objects representing available slots in 30-minute intervals.

    • getAllTimesForWaitingList

      public List<LocalTime> getAllTimesForWaitingList(LocalDate date, int guests)
      Returns a list of all possible time slots for the waiting list on a given date. Unlike standard availability, this does not check if the restaurant is full, but only if the time falls within operating hours.
      Parameters:
      date - The date to check.
      guests - Number of guests.
      Returns:
      List of LocalTime objects within operating hours.

    • getNearestAvailableDates

      public List<AvailableDateTimes> getNearestAvailableDates(LocalDate requestedDate, int guests)
      Checks availability for the two days following the requested date. * @param requestedDate The date the user originally wanted.
      Parameters:
      guests - The number of guests.
      Returns:
      A list of AvailableDateTimes objects for the next two available days.

    • getAllReservations

      public List<Reservation> getAllReservations()
      Retrieves all reservations from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all Reservation entities.

    • updateReservation

      public boolean updateReservation(UpdateReservationRequest ur)
      Updates an existing reservation based on an update request. * @param ur The update request containing new reservation details.
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise.

    • updateReservationFull

      public boolean updateReservationFull(Reservation reservation)
      Updates a complete reservation entity in the database. * @param reservation The reservation object to update.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • addReservation

      public boolean addReservation(Reservation r)
      Adds a new reservation to the system. Validates capacity and time slot availability before confirming. * @param r The reservation entity to add.
      Returns:
      true if the reservation was successfully placed.

    • canFitReservation

      private boolean canFitReservation(LocalDate date, LocalTime time, int newGroupSize, int durationHours)
      Internal logic to determine if a new group can be seated at a specific time. Simulates the seating of all overlapping reservations to ensure a table is available. * @param date The date of the reservation.
      Parameters:
      time - The start time of the reservation.
      newGroupSize - Number of guests in the new group.
      durationHours - The expected duration of the reservation.
      Returns:
      true if the group can be accommodated, false if the restaurant is over-capacity.

    • generateConfirmationCode

      private int generateConfirmationCode()
      Generates a random 6-digit confirmation code for a reservation.
      Returns:
      An integer between 100000 and 999999.

    • cancelReservation

      public boolean cancelReservation(User user, Integer reservationId, Integer confirmationCode, Integer guestId)
      Cancels a reservation based on user role or confirmation details. * @param user The user attempting the cancellation (Staff/Subscriber).
      Parameters:
      reservationId - The ID of the reservation (used for staff).
      confirmationCode - The code of the reservation (used for guests).
      guestId - Optional guest ID.
      Returns:
      true if the cancellation was successful.

    • getReservationByCode

      public Reservation getReservationByCode(int code)
      Finds a specific reservation by its confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      code - The 6-digit confirmation code.
      Returns:
      The Reservation object if found, otherwise null.

    • getReservationsByCustomer

      public List<Reservation> getReservationsByCustomer(int customerId)
      Retrieves all reservations made by a specific customer.
      Parameters:
      customerId - The ID of the customer.
      Returns:
      A list of their reservations.

    • hasConfirmedReservation

      public boolean hasConfirmedReservation(int userId)
      Checks if a user has at least one active confirmed reservation.
      Parameters:
      userId - The customer ID.
      Returns:
      true if a confirmed reservation exists.

    • findFreeTable

      private Table findFreeTable(int groupSize)
      Finds a currently free table that fits the group size. Used during the walk-in or arrival seating process. * @param groupSize The number of people to seat.
      Returns:
      A suitable Table object if available, otherwise null.

    • seatCustomerByCode

      public ServerResponse seatCustomerByCode(int confirmationCode, int userId, LocalTime actualArrivalTime)
      Processes the seating of a customer when they arrive at the restaurant. Validates the confirmation code, checks for system cancellations, and assigns a physical table. * @param confirmationCode The code provided by the customer.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user.
      actualArrivalTime - The time the customer actually arrived.
      Returns:
      A ServerResponse containing the success status and relevant messages or table ID.

    • markReservationAsNotified

      public boolean markReservationAsNotified(int reservationID)
      Marks a reservation as 'notified' in the database, typically after a system-initiated cancellation. * @param reservationID The ID of the reservation to update.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful.
